title: Luxury Ocean View Condo
description: Stunning ocean views from this luxury residence at the prestigious Acqualina Resort & Residences. Floor-to-ceiling windows, marble floors, and a gourmet kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances. Private beach access and world-class amenities.

title: Modern Brickell Living
description: Sleek modern unit in the heart of Brickell's financial district. Stunning bay and city views from the 42nd floor. Resort-style pool deck, spa, and fine dining downstairs. Walking distance to Brickell City Centre.

title: Penthouse Suite
description: Exclusive penthouse at The Setai with panoramic ocean and city views. 4,500 sqft of luxury living with private elevator, chef's kitchen, and wraparound terrace. Five-star hotel services and three infinity pools.

title: Waterfront Family Home
description: Beautiful waterfront home with private dock on a quiet cul-de-sac. Open floor plan with soaring ceilings, impact windows throughout, and a chef's kitchen. Resort-style backyard with pool, jacuzzi, and covered terrace.

title: Beachfront Studio
description: Fully furnished beachfront studio with direct ocean views. Hotel-style amenities include beach service, pool, spa, gym, and valet parking. Perfect for seasonal rentals or year-round luxury living.

title: Luxury Bal Harbour Condo
description: Elegant condo steps from the beach and Bal Harbour Shops. Renovated with European finishes, open kitchen, and spacious balcony. Full-service building with pool, gym, and 24-hour concierge.

title: Hollywood Beach Retreat
description: Resort-style living on Hollywood Beach with ocean views. Fully furnished designer unit with balcony. Amenities include rooftop pool, beach club, spa, restaurant, and 24-hour room service.

title: Panorama Tower Unit
description: High floor unit in Miami's tallest residential tower with breathtaking city and bay views. Modern finishes, spacious layout, and world-class amenities including rooftop pool, spa, and bowling alley.

title: Coconut Grove Estate
description: Grand estate on a lush, gated lot in the heart of Coconut Grove. 8,500 sqft of living space with soaring ceilings, home theater, wine cellar, and staff quarters. Resort-style grounds with infinity pool and outdoor kitchen.

title: Sail on Brickell Unit
description: Affordable entry to the Brickell lifestyle. Bright 1-bedroom with modern finishes and city views. Building features pool, gym, business center, and is walking distance to Mary Brickell Village.

title: Key Biscayne Villa
description: Spacious villa with tropical gardens on exclusive Key Biscayne island. Open floor plan, updated kitchen, and large covered patio. Community amenities include beach club, tennis, golf, and marina.

title: HYDE Beach Residence
description: Designer-finished residence with ocean views at the iconic HYDE Beach House. Premium finishes throughout, spacious balcony, and access to all resort amenities including beach club, rooftop pool, and spa.
